target_market_label.zh: 密克罗尼西亚联邦（资源与发展部/州公用事业）
target_market_label.zht: 密克羅尼西亞聯邦（資源與發展部/州公共事業）

title.en: China-to-Micronesia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入密克罗尼西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入密克羅尼西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China solar PV inverter documentation against FSM Department of Resources and Development context, Pohnpei and Chuuk state utility interconnection practice, IEC 62109 baseline, likely IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 Americas interconnection direction, EMC expectations, and the FSM 120/240 V 60 Hz NEMA-style grid versus China 220/380 V 50 Hz baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与密克罗尼西亚联邦（FSM）国家资源与发展部（DRD）背景、波奈佩与楚克州级公用事业并网实践、IEC 62109基准、可能采用的IEEE 1547与UL 1741美洲并网方向、EMC要求，以及FSM 120/240 V 60 Hz NEMA体系电网与中国220/380 V 50 Hz基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國光伏逆變器文件與密克羅尼西亞聯邦（FSM）國家資源與發展部（DRD）背景、波奈佩與楚克州級公共事業併網實務、IEC 62109基準、可能採用的IEEE 1547與UL 1741美洲併網方向、EMC要求，以及FSM 120/240 V 60 Hz NEMA體系電網與中國220/380 V 50 Hz基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DRD conformity determination, state-utility interconnection approval, customs determination, hurricane-resilience engineering assessment, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current FSM standards, state utility requirements, local electrical code practice, and island-specific hurricane and corrosion exposure requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DRD合规范围裁定、州级并网批准、海关裁定、飓风韧性工程评估或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验FSM现行标准、州公用事业要求、当地电气规范实践及岛屿环境下的飓风和腐蚀暴露要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DRD合規範圍裁定、州級併網批准、海關裁定、颶風韌性工程評估或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方與安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗FSM現行標準、州公共事業要求、當地電氣規範實務及島嶼環境下的颶風和腐蝕暴露要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to FSM, the key practical gap is voltage and frequency: FSM is a 120/240 V, 60 Hz market versus China’s 220/380 V, 50 Hz system. Exporters should revalidate firmware, anti-islanding, ride-through, reconnection, protection thresholds, and harmonics for FSM operation. In practice, the target technical direction is IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 in US-aligned installations, while IEC 62109 remains the baseline electrical safety framework. DRD and state utility requirements should be confirmed per project because FSM regulation is state-based and still maturing.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口FSM时，核心实际差距是电压和频率：FSM为120/240 V、60 Hz市场，而中国为220/380 V、50 Hz系统。出口商应对FSM工况重新验证固件、防孤岛、穿越、重连、保护阈值和谐波。实践中，FSM项目技术方向是美国体系的IEEE 1547与UL 1741，而IEC 62109仍作为安全基准。由于FSM以州为单位监管且制度仍在成熟中，DRD和州公用事业要求应按项目单独确认。
answer_first.zht: 中國光伏逆變器輸出FSM時，核心實際差距是電壓與頻率：FSM為120/240 V、60 Hz市場，而中國為220/380 V、50 Hz系統。出口商應對FSM工況重新驗證韌體、防孤島、穿越、重連、保護閾值和諧波。實務上，FSM項目技術方向是美國體系之IEEE 1547與UL 1741，而IEC 62109仍為安全基準。由於FSM以州為單位監管且制度仍在成熟中，DRD與州公共事業要求需按項目逐一確認。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
